questions.template: How much power is delivered when {w} J of work is done in {t} seconds?
A {f} N force pushes an object at constant {v} m/s. What is the power delivered?
A {p} W motor lifts a {m} kg mass. At what constant speed can it lift the mass? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
An elevator lifts {m} kg to a height of {h} m in {t} seconds. What is the power output? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
